title: Write ferrum_extlib_tls.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_tls: TLS 1.2+1.3 only (1.0/1.1 absent, not disabled). Not in Ferrum stdlib (crypto primitives present but not a TLS stack). Design extlib module: TLS 1.3 cipher suites (AES-256-GCM, ChaCha20-Poly1305, AES-128-GCM), TLS 1.2 ECDHE-only suites, SNI required, no renegotiation, Heartbleed-class structural fix, QUIC record protection API, post-quantum X25519Kyber768 hybrid, FIPS backend mode.
